hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$ROOT" ] && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$ROOT/scripts/docs-freshness-check.sh" ]; then bash "$ROOT/scripts/docs-freshness-check.sh" "$FILE"; fi
